# Port Chamber

**Summary**: A physical enclosure used to isolate a surface area for direct measurement of evaporation rates.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] used a portable chamber to measure evaporation rate at Sabkha JaybUwayyid.
